notes: Phase 7 DONE: 5/5 successful scripted pick-place demos. Redesigned trajectory: named constants (PICK_APPROACH_Z=0.40, PICK_GRASP_Z=0.17, LIFT_Z=0.40, PLACE_XY=0.65/0.20); smoothstep target interpolation; track-live-cube only on approach/descent; pre-close grip-bias compensation (GRIP_BIAS_Y=+0.018) fixes the Robotiq mimic-chain asymmetric close that used to shove the cube -18mm; split transport into 3 short legs to keep diff-IK inside a stable joint branch; robot solver iterations 4->16/1->4 to match cube; cube friction 0.9/0.8 -> 1.5/1.5 max-combine. The debugging-level breakthrough was spotting that the success term fires mid-transport (cube enters 8cm tolerance while still gripped), env auto-resets on terminated, and the loop's 10-step sustained-success check never triggered before the reset nuked the scene. Fix: treat `terminated and not truncated` as immediate success. Output at datasets/teleop/cube_scripted.hdf5 (215 MB, 5 episodes).
